transcript: Good evening everyone from Denver. It's the home of the champion Nugget to try to close out this first round series again. Here comes Murray, trying to push on the fly, got the two. Russell with a three, with a rebound by Davis. Scott Jumeirah will put up a three, and that is a good sign for LA. A welcome sign for Laker fans. Hasn't scratched double figures in this series whatsoever. Oh, well. Port Murray with the three. James with a pocket pass. Reeves and Flett takes it in for two. A switch on defense with Davis. Inside Reeves fronting Jokic. It's a two-on-one. LeBron and into AD on a great transitional play. That's what the Lakers want to do, get in transition, get easy baskets to set the tone. Leaves, in stride, Davis gets it to go. Maybe three rebounds for Jokic. There he comes, down the lane. He can't put it in once, twice, third time, no! It's picked up by Jokic. On the wing, Cornwell-Polk, full steam ahead. And Jokic will hit it back up and in. Oh, and Cornwell-Polk turned an angle. Anthony Davis. Shot clock at four. Murray surveys. Davis is there. The long shot from three. It's Holiday outside. In the corner. Watson will drive on Reeves with a spin. Murray free side it's Holiday outside, in the corner, Watson her drive on Reeves with the spin, Murray free, sideline, triple. What did he say before the game, he's going to get more catch and shoot opportunities with that foot. With the rebound, Davis who taps it up and in and parachutes to get in position to get the two for the Lakers, down low Gordon. The activity, the energy we talked about with Aaron Gordon, he's so much better better than his numbers but they have to have his energy every single night here comes LeBron crashing into Gordon he'll get you again two or three double quarter launches a triple get on fire all series Reds he'll come rumbling the other way Jackson free the fire it's a three It's's the shoes gotta be the shoes when you see miss max shoes you know red jackson's in the game here's what jackson wants to do dribble sit 24 looking for gordon bobby the round that ends up the corner and his three is called from outside of what appeared to be a busted play. LeBron working on Murray, and he knows that leg is at 100%. LeBron exploits it right there, coming off a 30-point game for LeBron with four, and he's two and three in his start. Jackson Trigger. What did you call it, Diddy Bop? It's Diddy Bop. This is a ridge you may have to deal with the rest of the game It's it from outside he had four as we said earlier in game four LeBron purging ahead Davis plowing his way into your kitchen Captured by James into Davis who got great position inside the paint on Caldwell Post. LeBron will take it in, finding Davis on a beautiful pick and roll. Reeves working around the screen, finding some room in the paint. That is Austin Reeves. Oh, look at Hogan, down the lane, and scoop it home with a pretty play. James, crafty pass. Hachimura takes it with a spin move. And he got Jokic in a blunder inside. Jokic into Davis. It's Gordon. Spies it in. Misses the jackhammer. It's LeBron tapping it. And then down court Russell. Got it with ease. And that missed jam by Gordon who says he was shoved in mid-flight. Jelgich has got six points, and now eight. James, here he puts up a three. Bullseye! LeBron puts it through. Denver only has three field goals in the last eight and a half minutes. Porter with the reverse. Sort of starting to get it going here. Murray with a beautiful fadeaway shot. You would never know that leg is an issue. Inside goes. He got it from LeBron. And those two work so well together. My goodness. They continue to be one of the most devastating combos in the NBA. Gordon pumping. He threw the defense up and hits a beautiful three. A rare beautiful three. And double teamed is Davis. Shot clock at six. Hachimura free in the corner for three. He's hitting them better tonight than he did the other night and any time else in this series. James will drive on Porter. Take it in! With a two-hand flush. he detonates and goes right at the rack, it's Porter, Michael Porter Jr. puts it in, 13 for him, into Murray, no call, down goes Murray, up and off goes the shot, and Murray is down, slow to get up, Horton because Gooden cleaves the ball in. It's Russell. It's a three. Russell puts ball in. It's Russell. It's a three. Russell puts it in. The lead expands for the Lakers. Into Davis. Shot clock at five. Murray twirling around, putting up a shot and getting it to go. On the road to Jokic. Creeping his way in. Jokic with 10 in the first two of the second half. Long shot, LeBron! What a stroke. Jokic inside. Hachimura will go against Murray. Murray again spins inside and gets it to go. And his presence has been felt with another basket there and 11 points for him. Jokic out there. This is over the reach of Davis. Ever since Jokic is starting to come alive here offensively. Cornwall post three. No. Rebound Cornwall post. Drives. Yes. It's Davis Going over corner Into Hachimura! It's a rebound by Gordon. And numbers. Perkins. Murray has shown a lot of resolve. Dwayne scoops it home. James gets it. And he flies down the court. Got it. Count it. Foul. He'll to the line, and he can possibly tie, with 2.46 to go in the third, Jokic, thrashing in for two, here's Jackson with the ball, takes it down the middle off to Gordon, in the side, Porter, three, good! LeBron armed to the rack, oh no, now LeBron is down Russell will move Cross court, Dinwiddie That's a three Spencer Dinwiddie knocks in a triple Well obviously when AD is out He's a great rim protector He's a great offensive player So we gotta load up to LeBron He's looking to get downhill in the top And offensively we gotta get Nikola Jokic going Gordon to Morian where he's three Five point swing Then go to him LeBron James a triple Got it Thanks for watching! The offensive, we've got to get Nikola Jokic going. Gordon to Murray and Murray at three. Five-point swing. Then go to one. LeBron James, a triple. Got it. Oh, ho, ho, ho. James cutting. Good-looking jam. Hachimura. LeBron, nine assists, no turnovers. Hiving hard. Right into Caldwell. Pope. Got it. Fouled. He just steamrolled him. Yes, Murray, you'll pitch. LeBron's got the rebound, the outlet to Russell, sets up, makes the faceover and dives in for two. Murray bad, half and all, he's got 23, and that was knocked away inside. Murray got the screen, finds a sliver of room. Murray got the rebound. Outside, Caldwell for three! And a one-point Nuggets lead. In the corner, Reeves driving by the outcatch and puts it up. Gordon knocked it away. Goal turned on Gordon. Porter got it and fires a triple. He has 26 points tonight. He had 27 in L.A. There goes Reeves. Can tie. Here he does. Great hesitation. Yes. It's Murray coming and jamming it in. Oh, he just cleaved the ball through. Reeves trying to tie it again. And does. Here goes Murray into a nest of defenders and still gets it to go. Off to Russell, slashing down for two. And ties it at 99. And he'll get your work on Anthony Davis. Bulldozing by him, plowing inside. Got Got caught up in his L.A. ball. Side out. No foul on the play. Into Hachimura. Reeves will put up a three. Good! What a shot! The bump, the grind, the spin, the lean, the feed. It's out to Caldwell Pope. He'll pry a 14-footer. No! Jokic! Yes! LeBron makes a move down the lane, into three. Good! What a shot by James. And the shot clock is at eight. Reeves will defend Murray. The screen by Jokic. Now Davis defends. Two-point shot. No. Rebound Gordon. Doubled inside. Spins out of traffic. Out to Murray. Really good. James. Dancing. Trying to tie. Up and off and a foul. Another tie. Difference of two seconds. The game clock and the shot clock. Worst case scenario, we're going to overtime. Yoga to screen. Murray to try to break the tie. No timeout by the Lakers. They got to go. James, a bump, a feed, a print shot. Now, zeroes on the clock. the Nuggets advance, they have won, and the defense of their championship title is alive and well.
